heading: Practice of law prohibited
label: 607 Practice of law prohibited
text: An officer or employee of the Administrative Office shall not engage directly or indirectly in the practice of law in any court of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 445 (, as added , ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 303Aug. 7, 1939, ch. 501, § 153 Stat. 1223This section contains the last paragraph of title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 445. The remainder of said section is incorporated in sections 602 and 603 of this title.Changes were made in phraseology.
